help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: We're here to help you with everything you need
help.guide_publish_desc: Easily publish your ads via the Create Ad button. Add an image, description, price, and location. Choose the right category for your ad to reach the most interested users. You can also promote your ad to appear at the top of results.
help.guide_wallet_desc: Charge your wallet via Vodafone Cash or InstaPay. Transfer the amount to the specified number and upload the receipt image. Your request will be reviewed by admin within hours and approved.
help.guide_promo_desc: Promote your ad to reach thousands of interested users. Choose from multiple promotion packages: Basic, Standard, Premium, or VIP. Each package provides wider reach and additional features.
help.guide_chat_desc: Communicate directly with sellers and buyers via the built-in messaging system. Send text messages, inquire about products, and negotiate prices easily and securely.
help.guide_friends_desc: Add new friends and follow their activity. Accept friend requests and connect with community members. The more friends you have, the more buying and selling opportunities.
help.guide_saved_desc: Save ads that interest you to return to later. Use filters and search to find what you want quickly. You can sort saved items by price, date, or category.
help.subject: Subject
help.messageSentDesc: Our support team will contact you as soon as possible
help.phoneRequired: You must add a phone number to your account first to contact support
help.phoneRequiredDesc: You must add a phone number to your account so we can contact you regarding your message
help.faq_q1: How do I publish my ad on Nawaqes?
help.faq_a1: You can publish your ad by clicking the Create Ad button on the homepage. Add an image, description, price, and choose the right category. Your ad will appear immediately to all interested users in the same category.
help.faq_q2: How do I charge my wallet?
help.faq_a2: Go to the wallet page and choose a charging method (Vodafone Cash or InstaPay). Transfer the required amount to the specified number and upload the receipt image. Your request will be reviewed and approved within hours.
help.faq_q3: What is trust score and how do I improve it?
help.faq_a3: Trust score reflects your credibility on the platform. You can improve it by: posting genuine ads, honoring transactions, receiving positive ratings, and verifying your account.
help.faq_q4: How do I promote my ad?
help.faq_a4: Click the Promote Post button on any of your ads. Choose the appropriate package (Basic, Standard, Premium, VIP). The cost will be deducted from your wallet and the request will be reviewed by admin.
help.faq_q5: How do I contact a seller?
help.faq_a5: Click the chat button on the ad. A direct conversation with the seller will open. You can send messages, negotiate the price, and agree on details.
help.faq_q6: How do I save an ad for later?
help.faq_a6: Click the save icon (bookmark) on any ad. It will be added to your saved page. You can access your saved items from the sidebar menu at any time.
help.faq_q7: Can I edit my ad after publishing?
help.faq_a7: Yes, you can edit your ad by clicking the edit button on the ad details page. You can change the image, description, price, location, and category.
help.faq_q8: How do I protect my account?
help.faq_a8: Use a strong password and don't share it with anyone. Enable smart alerts to get notified of any activity on your account. Review privacy settings to control your data visibility.

promotionPackagesPage.title: Promotion Packages
promotionPackagesPage.subtitle: Choose the right package and boost your ad reach
promotionPackagesPage.step1Desc: Pick a package that fits your budget
promotionPackagesPage.step2Desc: Amount is deducted from your balance
promotionPackagesPage.needMore: You need {{amount}} EGP more in your wallet
promotionPackagesPage.faq1Q: How do I promote my ad?
promotionPackagesPage.faq1A: Go to your ad and click Promote, then choose the right package and pay from your wallet. Your request will be reviewed by admin within minutes.
promotionPackagesPage.faq2A: After admin approval, promotion starts immediately and continues for the duration of the chosen package. Notifications will be sent to users interested in your ad category.
promotionPackagesPage.faq3A: If your promotion request is rejected by admin, the full amount is automatically refunded to your wallet.
promotionPackagesPage.faq4Q: What is the difference between packages?
promotionPackagesPage.faq4A: Each package provides a different number of reach, notifications, and duration. The higher the package, the more your ad reaches interested users.

fcm.title: Push Notifications Manager
fcm.unavailable: FCM unavailable - using WebSocket fallback only
fcm.setupStep1: 1. Create a Firebase project at console.firebase.google.com
fcm.setupStep2: 2. Enable Cloud Messaging in the project
fcm.setupStep3: 3. Create a Service Account and download the JSON file
fcm.setupStep4: 4. Upload the file as nawaqes-firebase-admin.json to /data/ on the server
fcm.setupStep5: 5. Or set env vars: FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID, FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL, FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY
fcm.envVarsDesc: Instead of a JSON file, you can use these environment variables
fcm.autoNotifyDesc: FCM push notifications are sent automatically for the following events
